TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O kimad no Kiwit niyaro' to lalengawan no 'Amis/Pangcah == O kimad no Kiwit niyaro' to lalengawan, no Amis/Pangcah o Kiwit a niyaro' ('Amis/Pangcah: Kiwit, kowan no Kohkoh Kalingko) a kimad no lalengawan, no to'as mafolaw tayni i aniniay niyaro' ko tatodong no sasowalen. Ratoh no kawakawasan Lenlen No itiya:ay ho, ira ko mararamoday kawas a tamdaw fainayan ci Sra, fafahiyan ci Nakaw, nai kakarayan malokelon tayni Tawrayan sa'etal a ma'orip (aniniay Tawrayan no Posko), nanoya masofoc to fainayan ci Tapang Masera ato fafahiyan ci Nakaw tatosa, nikawrira tiya cecay romi'ad malenlen ko hekal, malaliw no mama ato ina tayra kakarayan a caay to ka pasifana' ko maomahay i omah a wawa, o caayay ka lecad ko 'icel no nia malikakaay a matakop no lenlen, itiya litado sa mihadoy to toptip no fafoy a mafadoc, manawnaw tayra i Cilangasan (aniniay lotok no Haciriwan no Fakong), itira i tokos no lotok a paloma', oya 'osaw noya malikiday i toptop a hafay ko malokakaenen . O roma a sowal to Kiwitay niyaro' a kasangasaw pitekaan a 'orip o nai lilisay riyar no Posong, nikawrira o nano ta'akay lonen ko saka ca'efis to nanom no riyar, dengan ci Sra ato ci Nakaw milikaka ko mafadocay manawnaw tayra i Cilangasan a lotok ; ano eca o ni cekiwan i tangila matefaday a 'asad ko kakaenen nangra . Mafolaw a mlinah Nawhani adihay ko 'oner i lotok no Cilangasan, orasaka o nia malikakaay tatosa ato nikasado'edo ranikay mafolaw tayra i Kalala a niyaro' (aniniay Sapad, Kohkoh no Kalala), nikawrira nawhani awaay ko kaliomahan itira saka, mafolaw aca tayra aniniay a Kiwit a niyaro' paloma' . Ira ko ramo a sowal, o wawa no nia malikakaay tatolo mitala to kakerahan no lenlen itiya, malikelon nai lotok milkilim to kaliomahan, nanoya o saka fana'aw no wawawawa ala misanga' sa to kahapinangan: sakakaay ci Calaw misanga' to pa'enor, saka tosa ci Kakomalan (tato'asan no Tafalong) misanga' to kawal, saka tolo ci Komod (Popo, salawacan no Kalingko) mitelek to dadangoyan, o teloc ni Calaw o Kiwi, na malokelon cangra nai lotok pasitimol ko rakat, pacarcar i kawali no Kiwit a dahetal, ikor pasietip mido'edo to Tarawadaw a 'alo tangasa i Kalala a pahicera ko aro', tangasa i kalitengan no 'orip ni Calaw, nawhani caay ka nga'ay ko sra a makedal patiko aca tayra i dahetal, nikawrira caay ka halafin samsamen looden no Piyoma finacadan mafolaw heca tayra i Cepo' ka'amis no Tarawadaw a paniyaro', tangasa malasawad ko pisamsamen no Piyoma finacadan, itiya patiko tayra i kaetip katimol dafdaf no Kiwit a naloma'an patireng to saniyaro'an, nanoya malakapot to nano nisamsamen no Piyoma finacadan a Sadipongan a misaniyaro'; orasaka oya miliyasan nangra palomaan a Sapad malafokelohay to (Sapad fokeloh). O sadipongan a ngasaw o nai timolay a sanayasay, nao i Cepo'ay ko aro', i:kor mido'edo mililis to riyar a talatimol tahira i Kawasan niyaro', ikor nawhani 'epecen no Piyoma finacadan mafolaw heca tayra i Kalala, nikawrira eca pakaliyas to pisamsam a patalaw, saikoray mafolaw tayra i dahetal mikapot to kiwit ngasaw a maro', o kacingangan o nai Cepo'ay ho a sowal itiraay i dipong ko aro' sa o nian ko kacingangan; o roma a sowal o nano misiikeday to Monali' ngasaw ko Sadipongan a ngasaw, nai Cepo' mafolaw tayra i Na'elian, o nian sa ko pipangangan, ikor na omaanan patiko heca tayra i Cepo' nanoya mikapot to Kiwit a niyaro' . Roma a sowal Ira ko roma a sowal misofoc to sepatay wawa ci Sra ato ci Nakaw malikaka, masasiiked Tapang Masra (to'as no Kalala niyaro'), Tomay Masra (to'as no Ciwidian niyaro'), Calaw Pana (to'as no Kiwit niyaro'), Karo Kool (to'as no Tafalong) ; ira ko somowalay a tamdaw aniniay maro'ay i Kalala niyaro' a 'Amis/Pangcah ira ko teloc no Sadipongan saan, ano eca o nai Kiwitay niyaro' mafolaway tayni Fasay a ngasaw . Pihiningan 'Amis/Pangcah Cilangasan: ikor no lenlen manawnaw tayra i Cilangasan. Kahitingay pa'enor: o satadamaanay no Kiwit niyaro' a kacipinangan. Aling: o ramaay a sowal no to'as mialaay to 'enor a tamdaw. Pinengnengan to tilid. 2.Kiwit Niyaro'. ( 2020-10-30). Mifalicay to tilid. ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ to~u ɾaɾəŋawan no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ == o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ to~u ɾaɾəŋawan, no~u amis/paŋʦaħ o~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ (ʡamis/paŋʦaħ: kiwit, ko~uwan no~u ko~uħko~uħ kaɾiŋko~u) a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾaɾəŋawan, no~u to~uʡas mafo~uɾaw tajni i aniniaj nijaro~uʡ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u saso~uwaɾən. rato~uħ no~u kawakawasan ɾənɾən no~u itija:aj ħo~u, ira ko~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw fainajan ʦi sra, fafaħijan ʦi nakaw, nai kakarajan maɾo~ukəɾo~un tajni tawrajan saʡətaɾ a maʡo~urip (aniniaj tawrajan no~u po~usko~u), nano~uja maso~ufo~uʦ to~u fainajan ʦi tapaŋ masəra ato~u fafaħijan ʦi nakaw tato~usa, nikawrira tija ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾənɾən ko~u ħəkaɾ, maɾaɾiw no~u mama ato~u ina tajra kakarajan a ʦaaj to~u ka pasifanaʡ ko~u mao~umaħaj i o~umaħ a wawa, o~u ʦaajaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u nia maɾikakaaj a matako~up no~u ɾənɾən, itija ɾitaɬ~ɮo~u sa miħaɬ~ɮo~uj to~u to~uptip no~u fafo~uj a mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦ, manawnaw tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan (aniniaj ɾo~uto~uk no~u ħaʦiriwan no~u fako~uŋ), itira i to~uko~us no~u ɾo~uto~uk a paɾo~umaʡ, o~uja ʡo~usaw no~uja maɾikiɬ~ɮaj i to~upto~up a ħafaj ko~u maɾo~ukakaənən . o~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ to~u kiwitaj nijaro~uʡ a kasaŋasaw pitəkaan a ʡo~urip o~u nai ɾiɾisaj rijar no~u po~uso~uŋ, nikawrira o~u nano~u taʡakaj ɾo~unən ko~u saka ʦaʡəfis to~u nano~um no~u rijar, ɬ~ɮəŋan ʦi sra ato~u ʦi nakaw miɾikaka ko~u mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj manawnaw tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan a ɾo~uto~uk ; ano~u əʦa o~u ni ʦəkiwan i taŋiɾa matəfaɬ~ɮaj a ʡasaɬ~ɮ ko~u kakaənən naŋra . mafo~uɾaw a mɾinaħ nawħani aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ʡo~unər i ɾo~uto~uk no~u ʦiɾaŋasan, o~urasaka o~u nia maɾikakaaj tato~usa ato~u nikasaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ranikaj mafo~uɾaw tajra i kaɾaɾa a nijaro~uʡ (aniniaj sapaɬ~ɮ, ko~uħko~uħ no~u kaɾaɾa), nikawrira nawħani awaaj ko~u kaɾio~umaħan itira saka, mafo~uɾaw aʦa tajra aniniaj a kiwit a nijaro~uʡ paɾo~umaʡ . ira ko~u ramo~u a so~uwaɾ, o~u wawa no~u nia maɾikakaaj tato~uɾo~u mitaɾa to~u kakəraħan no~u ɾənɾən itija, maɾikəɾo~un nai ɾo~uto~uk miɾkiɾim to~u kaɾio~umaħan, nano~uja o~u saka fanaʡaw no~u wawawawa aɾa misaŋaʡ sa to~u kaħapinaŋan: sakakaaj ʦi ʦaɾaw misaŋaʡ to~u paʡəno~ur, saka to~usa ʦi kako~umaɾan (tato~uʡasan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ) misaŋaʡ to~u kawaɾ, saka to~uɾo~u ʦi ko~umo~uɬ~ɮ (po~upo~u, saɾawaʦan no~u kaɾiŋko~u) mitəɾək to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, o~u təɾo~uʦ ni ʦaɾaw o~u kiwi, na maɾo~ukəɾo~un ʦaŋra nai ɾo~uto~uk pasitimo~uɾ ko~u rakat, paʦarʦar i kawaɾi no~u kiwit a ɬ~ɮaħətaɾ, iko~ur pasiətip miɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u to~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw a ʡaɾo~u taŋasa i kaɾaɾa a paħiʦəra ko~u aro~uʡ, taŋasa i kaɾitəŋan no~u ʡo~urip ni ʦaɾaw, nawħani ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u sra a makəɬ~ɮaɾ patiko~u aʦa tajra i ɬ~ɮaħətaɾ, nikawrira ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin samsamən ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮən no~u pijo~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan mafo~uɾaw ħəʦa tajra i ʦəpo~uʡ kaʡamis no~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw a panijaro~uʡ, taŋasa maɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u pisamsamən no~u pijo~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan, itija patiko~u tajra i kaətip katimo~uɾ ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf no~u kiwit a naɾo~umaʡan patirəŋ to~u sanijaro~uʡan, nano~uja maɾakapo~ut to~u nano~u nisamsamən no~u pijo~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan a saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a misanijaro~uʡ; o~urasaka o~uja miɾijasan naŋra paɾo~umaan a sapaɬ~ɮ maɾafo~ukəɾo~uħaj to~u (sapaɬ~ɮ fo~ukəɾo~uħ). o~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a ŋasaw o~u nai timo~uɾaj a sanajasaj, nao~u i ʦəpo~uʡaj ko~u aro~uʡ, i:ko~ur miɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u miɾiɾis to~u rijar a taɾatimo~uɾ taħira i kawasan nijaro~uʡ, iko~ur nawħani ʡəpəʦən no~u pijo~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan mafo~uɾaw ħəʦa tajra i kaɾaɾa, nikawrira əʦa pakaɾijas to~u pisamsam a pataɾaw, saiko~uraj mafo~uɾaw tajra i ɬ~ɮaħətaɾ mikapo~ut to~u kiwit ŋasaw a maro~uʡ, o~u kaʦiŋaŋan o~u nai ʦəpo~uʡaj ħo~u a so~uwaɾ itiraaj i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u aro~uʡ sa o~u nian ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan; o~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ o~u nano~u misiikəɬ~ɮaj to~u mo~unaɾiʡ ŋasaw ko~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a ŋasaw, nai ʦəpo~uʡ mafo~uɾaw tajra i naʡəɾian, o~u nian sa ko~u pipaŋaŋan, iko~ur na o~umaanan patiko~u ħəʦa tajra i ʦəpo~uʡ nano~uja mikapo~ut to~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ . ro~uma a so~uwaɾ ira ko~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ miso~ufo~uʦ to~u səpataj wawa ʦi sra ato~u ʦi nakaw maɾikaka, masasiikəɬ~ɮ tapaŋ masra (to~uʡas no~u kaɾaɾa nijaro~uʡ), to~umaj masra (to~uʡas no~u ʦiwiɬ~ɮian nijaro~uʡ), ʦaɾaw pana (to~uʡas no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ), karo~u ko~uo~uɾ (to~uʡas no~u tafaɾo~uŋ) ; ira ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw aniniaj maro~uʡaj i kaɾaɾa nijaro~uʡ a ʡamis/paŋʦaħ ira ko~u təɾo~uʦ no~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan saan, ano~u əʦa o~u nai kiwitaj nijaro~uʡ mafo~uɾawaj tajni fasaj a ŋasaw . piħiniŋan ʡamis/paŋʦaħ ʦiɾaŋasan: iko~ur no~u ɾənɾən manawnaw tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan. kaħitiŋaj paʡəno~ur: o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ a kaʦipinaŋan. aɾiŋ: o~u ramaaj a so~uwaɾ no~u to~uʡas miaɾaaj to~u ʡəno~ur a tamɬ~ɮaw. pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. *.kiwit nijaro~uʡ. ( ****-**-**). mifaɾiʦaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. ʦi masao~u nikar
S.FORM: == O kimad no Kiwit niyaro' to lalengawan no 'Amis/Pangcah == O kimad no Kiwit niyaro' to lalengawan, no Amis/Pangcah o Kiwit a niyaro' ('Amis/Pangcah: Kiwit, kowan no Kohkoh Kalingko) a kimad no lalengawan, no to'as mafolaw tayni i aniniay niyaro' ko tatodong no sasowalen. Ratoh no kawakawasan Lenlen No itiya:ay ho, ira ko mararamoday kawas a tamdaw fainayan ci Sra, fafahiyan ci Nakaw, nai kakarayan malokelon tayni Tawrayan sa'etal a ma'orip (aniniay Tawrayan no Posko), nanoya masofoc to fainayan ci Tapang Masera ato fafahiyan ci Nakaw tatosa, nikawrira tiya cecay romi'ad malenlen ko hekal, malaliw no mama ato ina tayra kakarayan a caay to ka pasifana' ko maomahay i omah a wawa, o caayay ka lecad ko 'icel no nia malikakaay a matakop no lenlen, itiya litado sa mihadoy to toptip no fafoy a mafadoc, manawnaw tayra i Cilangasan (aniniay lotok no Haciriwan no Fakong), itira i tokos no lotok a paloma', oya 'osaw noya malikiday i toptop a hafay ko malokakaenen . O roma a sowal to Kiwitay niyaro' a kasangasaw pitekaan a 'orip o nai lilisay riyar no Posong, nikawrira o nano ta'akay lonen ko saka ca'efis to nanom no riyar, dengan ci Sra ato ci Nakaw milikaka ko mafadocay manawnaw tayra i Cilangasan a lotok ; ano eca o ni cekiwan i tangila matefaday a 'asad ko kakaenen nangra . Mafolaw a mlinah Nawhani adihay ko 'oner i lotok no Cilangasan, orasaka o nia malikakaay tatosa ato nikasado'edo ranikay mafolaw tayra i Kalala a niyaro' (aniniay Sapad, Kohkoh no Kalala), nikawrira nawhani awaay ko kaliomahan itira saka, mafolaw aca tayra aniniay a Kiwit a niyaro' paloma' . Ira ko ramo a sowal, o wawa no nia malikakaay tatolo mitala to kakerahan no lenlen itiya, malikelon nai lotok milkilim to kaliomahan, nanoya o saka fana'aw no wawawawa ala misanga' sa to kahapinangan: sakakaay ci Calaw misanga' to pa'enor, saka tosa ci Kakomalan (tato'asan no Tafalong) misanga' to kawal, saka tolo ci Komod (Popo, salawacan no Kalingko) mitelek to dadangoyan, o teloc ni Calaw o Kiwi, na malokelon cangra nai lotok pasitimol ko rakat, pacarcar i kawali no Kiwit a dahetal, ikor pasietip mido'edo to Tarawadaw a 'alo tangasa i Kalala a pahicera ko aro', tangasa i kalitengan no 'orip ni Calaw, nawhani caay ka nga'ay ko sra a makedal patiko aca tayra i dahetal, nikawrira caay ka halafin samsamen looden no Piyoma finacadan mafolaw heca tayra i Cepo' ka'amis no Tarawadaw a paniyaro', tangasa malasawad ko pisamsamen no Piyoma finacadan, itiya patiko tayra i kaetip katimol dafdaf no Kiwit a naloma'an patireng to saniyaro'an, nanoya malakapot to nano nisamsamen no Piyoma finacadan a Sadipongan a misaniyaro'; orasaka oya miliyasan nangra palomaan a Sapad malafokelohay to (Sapad fokeloh). O sadipongan a ngasaw o nai timolay a sanayasay, nao i Cepo'ay ko aro', i:kor mido'edo mililis to riyar a talatimol tahira i Kawasan niyaro', ikor nawhani 'epecen no Piyoma finacadan mafolaw heca tayra i Kalala, nikawrira eca pakaliyas to pisamsam a patalaw, saikoray mafolaw tayra i dahetal mikapot to kiwit ngasaw a maro', o kacingangan o nai Cepo'ay ho a sowal itiraay i dipong ko aro' sa o nian ko kacingangan; o roma a sowal o nano misiikeday to Monali' ngasaw ko Sadipongan a ngasaw, nai Cepo' mafolaw tayra i Na'elian, o nian sa ko pipangangan, ikor na omaanan patiko heca tayra i Cepo' nanoya mikapot to Kiwit a niyaro' . Roma a sowal Ira ko roma a sowal misofoc to sepatay wawa ci Sra ato ci Nakaw malikaka, masasiiked Tapang Masra (to'as no Kalala niyaro'), Tomay Masra (to'as no Ciwidian niyaro'), Calaw Pana (to'as no Kiwit niyaro'), Karo Kool (to'as no Tafalong) ; ira ko somowalay a tamdaw aniniay maro'ay i Kalala niyaro' a 'Amis/Pangcah ira ko teloc no Sadipongan saan, ano eca o nai Kiwitay niyaro' mafolaway tayni Fasay a ngasaw . Pihiningan 'Amis/Pangcah Cilangasan: ikor no lenlen manawnaw tayra i Cilangasan. Kahitingay pa'enor: o satadamaanay no Kiwit niyaro' a kacipinangan. Aling: o ramaay a sowal no to'as mialaay to 'enor a tamdaw. Pinengnengan to tilid. 2.Kiwit Niyaro'. ( 2020-10-30). Mifalicay to tilid. ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ to~u ɾaɾəŋawan no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ == o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ to~u ɾaɾəŋawan, no~u amis/paŋʦaħ o~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ (ʡamis/paŋʦaħ: kiwit, ko~uwan no~u ko~uħko~uħ kaɾiŋko~u) a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾaɾəŋawan, no~u to~uʡas mafo~uɾaw tajni i aniniaj nijaro~uʡ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u saso~uwaɾən. rato~uħ no~u kawakawasan ɾənɾən no~u itija:aj ħo~u, ira ko~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw fainajan ʦi sra, fafaħijan ʦi nakaw, nai kakarajan maɾo~ukəɾo~un tajni tawrajan saʡətaɾ a maʡo~urip (aniniaj tawrajan no~u po~usko~u), nano~uja maso~ufo~uʦ to~u fainajan ʦi tapaŋ masəra ato~u fafaħijan ʦi nakaw tato~usa, nikawrira tija ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾənɾən ko~u ħəkaɾ, maɾaɾiw no~u mama ato~u ina tajra kakarajan a ʦaaj to~u ka pasifanaʡ ko~u mao~umaħaj i o~umaħ a wawa, o~u ʦaajaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u nia maɾikakaaj a matako~up no~u ɾənɾən, itija ɾitaɬ~ɮo~u sa miħaɬ~ɮo~uj to~u to~uptip no~u fafo~uj a mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦ, manawnaw tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan (aniniaj ɾo~uto~uk no~u ħaʦiriwan no~u fako~uŋ), itira i to~uko~us no~u ɾo~uto~uk a paɾo~umaʡ, o~uja ʡo~usaw no~uja maɾikiɬ~ɮaj i to~upto~up a ħafaj ko~u maɾo~ukakaənən . o~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ to~u kiwitaj nijaro~uʡ a kasaŋasaw pitəkaan a ʡo~urip o~u nai ɾiɾisaj rijar no~u po~uso~uŋ, nikawrira o~u nano~u taʡakaj ɾo~unən ko~u saka ʦaʡəfis to~u nano~um no~u rijar, ɬ~ɮəŋan ʦi sra ato~u ʦi nakaw miɾikaka ko~u mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj manawnaw tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan a ɾo~uto~uk ; ano~u əʦa o~u ni ʦəkiwan i taŋiɾa matəfaɬ~ɮaj a ʡasaɬ~ɮ ko~u kakaənən naŋra . mafo~uɾaw a mɾinaħ nawħani aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ʡo~unər i ɾo~uto~uk no~u ʦiɾaŋasan, o~urasaka o~u nia maɾikakaaj tato~usa ato~u nikasaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ranikaj mafo~uɾaw tajra i kaɾaɾa a nijaro~uʡ (aniniaj sapaɬ~ɮ, ko~uħko~uħ no~u kaɾaɾa), nikawrira nawħani awaaj ko~u kaɾio~umaħan itira saka, mafo~uɾaw aʦa tajra aniniaj a kiwit a nijaro~uʡ paɾo~umaʡ . ira ko~u ramo~u a so~uwaɾ, o~u wawa no~u nia maɾikakaaj tato~uɾo~u mitaɾa to~u kakəraħan no~u ɾənɾən itija, maɾikəɾo~un nai ɾo~uto~uk miɾkiɾim to~u kaɾio~umaħan, nano~uja o~u saka fanaʡaw no~u wawawawa aɾa misaŋaʡ sa to~u kaħapinaŋan: sakakaaj ʦi ʦaɾaw misaŋaʡ to~u paʡəno~ur, saka to~usa ʦi kako~umaɾan (tato~uʡasan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ) misaŋaʡ to~u kawaɾ, saka to~uɾo~u ʦi ko~umo~uɬ~ɮ (po~upo~u, saɾawaʦan no~u kaɾiŋko~u) mitəɾək to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan, o~u təɾo~uʦ ni ʦaɾaw o~u kiwi, na maɾo~ukəɾo~un ʦaŋra nai ɾo~uto~uk pasitimo~uɾ ko~u rakat, paʦarʦar i kawaɾi no~u kiwit a ɬ~ɮaħətaɾ, iko~ur pasiətip miɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u to~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw a ʡaɾo~u taŋasa i kaɾaɾa a paħiʦəra ko~u aro~uʡ, taŋasa i kaɾitəŋan no~u ʡo~urip ni ʦaɾaw, nawħani ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ko~u sra a makəɬ~ɮaɾ patiko~u aʦa tajra i ɬ~ɮaħətaɾ, nikawrira ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin samsamən ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮən no~u pijo~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan mafo~uɾaw ħəʦa tajra i ʦəpo~uʡ kaʡamis no~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw a panijaro~uʡ, taŋasa maɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u pisamsamən no~u pijo~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan, itija patiko~u tajra i kaətip katimo~uɾ ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf no~u kiwit a naɾo~umaʡan patirəŋ to~u sanijaro~uʡan, nano~uja maɾakapo~ut to~u nano~u nisamsamən no~u pijo~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan a saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a misanijaro~uʡ; o~urasaka o~uja miɾijasan naŋra paɾo~umaan a sapaɬ~ɮ maɾafo~ukəɾo~uħaj to~u (sapaɬ~ɮ fo~ukəɾo~uħ). o~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a ŋasaw o~u nai timo~uɾaj a sanajasaj, nao~u i ʦəpo~uʡaj ko~u aro~uʡ, i:ko~ur miɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u miɾiɾis to~u rijar a taɾatimo~uɾ taħira i kawasan nijaro~uʡ, iko~ur nawħani ʡəpəʦən no~u pijo~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan mafo~uɾaw ħəʦa tajra i kaɾaɾa, nikawrira əʦa pakaɾijas to~u pisamsam a pataɾaw, saiko~uraj mafo~uɾaw tajra i ɬ~ɮaħətaɾ mikapo~ut to~u kiwit ŋasaw a maro~uʡ, o~u kaʦiŋaŋan o~u nai ʦəpo~uʡaj ħo~u a so~uwaɾ itiraaj i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u aro~uʡ sa o~u nian ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan; o~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ o~u nano~u misiikəɬ~ɮaj to~u mo~unaɾiʡ ŋasaw ko~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a ŋasaw, nai ʦəpo~uʡ mafo~uɾaw tajra i naʡəɾian, o~u nian sa ko~u pipaŋaŋan, iko~ur na o~umaanan patiko~u ħəʦa tajra i ʦəpo~uʡ nano~uja mikapo~ut to~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ . ro~uma a so~uwaɾ ira ko~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ miso~ufo~uʦ to~u səpataj wawa ʦi sra ato~u ʦi nakaw maɾikaka, masasiikəɬ~ɮ tapaŋ masra (to~uʡas no~u kaɾaɾa nijaro~uʡ), to~umaj masra (to~uʡas no~u ʦiwiɬ~ɮian nijaro~uʡ), ʦaɾaw pana (to~uʡas no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ), karo~u ko~uo~uɾ (to~uʡas no~u tafaɾo~uŋ) ; ira ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw aniniaj maro~uʡaj i kaɾaɾa nijaro~uʡ a ʡamis/paŋʦaħ ira ko~u təɾo~uʦ no~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan saan, ano~u əʦa o~u nai kiwitaj nijaro~uʡ mafo~uɾawaj tajni fasaj a ŋasaw . piħiniŋan ʡamis/paŋʦaħ ʦiɾaŋasan: iko~ur no~u ɾənɾən manawnaw tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan. kaħitiŋaj paʡəno~ur: o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ a kaʦipinaŋan. aɾiŋ: o~u ramaaj a so~uwaɾ no~u to~uʡas miaɾaaj to~u ʡəno~ur a tamɬ~ɮaw. pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. *.kiwit nijaro~uʡ. ( ****-**-**). mifaɾiʦaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. ʦi masao~u nikar
